name: wxcode-admin-carbon-devops
title: Carbon Admin
description: Near-black terminal admin aesthetic: carbon canvas (#0b0d10), raised panels (#14171c), green accent (#22c55e), blue secondary (#3b82f6), monospace IDs and codes on every key cell, amber/red state pills. Archetype = entity-switcher navbar with env pill switcher + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles with sparklines + pipeline board with stage chips + inline SVG bar chart + severity feed side panel + dense records table, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this dark carbon terminal admin aesthetic to my domain — near-black canvas, green accent, entity-switcher navbar with env pills, icon rail, 4 KPI tiles with sparklines, a pipeline board with stage chips, an inline SVG bar chart, a severity-feed side panel, and a dense records table with status pills, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个深色碳终端风格应用到我的领域：近黑底色、绿色强调色、带环境标签的实体切换导航栏、图标侧栏、带迷你折线图的 4 个 KPI 卡片、带阶段状态标签的管道看板、内联 SVG 条形图、严重性信息流侧面板，以及带状态标签的密集记录表格，并配套列表、表单和详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
